reviews.review_description: There's something extra satisfying about boxing robots that you just don't get boxing humans :)
Best app. Great app. Inspired. This app should win an Oscar or some kind of Award.

The beginner’s level I played thru the tutorial and the first level robot opponent was hysterical. It’s basically a slap fight not boxing but still I had fun. Maybe another level will change this bit I don’t mind .
If you’re looking for a real workout against a robot I’m sure you can find something else. This is good stress relief with fun visuals.
This game has problems it black boxes you and glitches way too much for the price we pay for this

developer_response.body: Hey Caterpillar, you might have commented on the wrong game. There's no 'black boxes' problem in Boxing Machine VR, and the game is available for free.
